mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CMPL_DT), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DAY_DATE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND CMPL_DT >= TO_DATE(#{weekStart}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CMPL_DT < TO_DATE(#{weekEnd}, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(CMPL_DT) ORDER BY TRUNC(CMPL_DT)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND CMPL_DT >= TO_DATE(#{rangeStart}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CMPL_DT < TO_DATE(#{rangeEnd}, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1

SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(s.TOTAL_STUDENTS, 0) = 0 OR NVL(lect.TOTAL_LECTURES, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(prog.TOTAL_COMPLETED, 0) * 100.0 / (s.TOTAL_STUDENTS * lect.TOTAL_LECTURES), 1 ) END FROM DUAL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_STUDENTS FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD IN ('01', '02') ) s ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_LECTURES FROM LECTURE WHERE COURSE_SN = ( SELECT COURSE_SN FROM CLASSROOM WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ) AND OPNN_YN = 'Y' ) lect ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COMPLETED FROM STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS scp JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON scp.CLASS_SN = cm.CLASS_SN AND scp.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD IN ('01', '02') WHERE scp.CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND scp.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ) prog ON 1 = 1

SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(a.TOTAL_ASGMT, 0) = 0 OR NVL(s.ACTIVE_CNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(sub.SUBMIT_CNT, 0) * 100.0 / (a.TOTAL_ASGMT * s.ACTIVE_CNT), 1 ) END FROM DUAL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ASGMT FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ) a ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS ACTIVE_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = '01' ) s ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS SUBMIT_CNT FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT asub JOIN ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab ON asub.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ) sub ON 1 = 1

SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = '01' ) = 0 OR ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXAM WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXAM_TAKER WHERE EXAM_SN = ( SELECT EXAM_SN FROM EXAM WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' ORDER BY EXAM_REG_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) ) * 100.0 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = '01' ), 1 ) END FROM DUAL

SELECT DISTINCT EVENT_DATE FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(EXAM_STRT_DT), 'YYYYMMDD') AS EVENT_DATE FROM EXAM WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' AND TO_CHAR(EXAM_STRT_DT, 'YYYYMM') = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SBMT_DDLN_DT), 'YYYYMMDD') FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND SBMT_DDLN_DT IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(SBMT_DDLN_DT, 'YYYYMM') = LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND SBMT_DDLN_DT > SYSDATE

SELECT E.EXAM_SN AS examSn, E.EXAM_REG_NM AS examRegNm, C.COURSE_NM AS courseNm FROM EXAM E JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE C ON C.COURSE_SN = CL.COURSE_SN WHERE E.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND E.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(E.EXAM_STRT_DT) AND TRUNC(E.EXAM_END_DT) ORDER BY E.EXAM_REG_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
